ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_start" TEXT /* Start date of the event, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD */,
  "event_end" TEXT /* End date of the event, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key used to identify and authorize requests */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., conference, seminar, workshop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event related to this publication */,
  "publication_from" TEXT /* Start date of the publication, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD */,
  "publication_to" TEXT /* End date of the publication, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of publication (e.g., published, draft, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., organizer, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The actual API key string */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the API key was created */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the API key expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being attended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attending the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., attending, not attending) */,
  "checked_in_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user checked in */,
  "checked_out_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user checked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which feedback is given */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., presentation, video) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., document, multimedia) */,
  "resource_url" TEXT /* URL where the resource is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_resources_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication channel (e.g., website, email) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of channel (e.g., social media, newsletter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication record */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel where the event was published */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being published */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date when the event was published to the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_publications_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES event_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_publications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_publishing_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being published */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel where the event was published */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date when the event was published to the channel */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_publishing_history_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_publishing_history_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES event_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being analyzed */,
  "attendance_count" INTEGER /* Number of attendees for the event */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score for the event (e.g., based on feedback, ratings) */,
  "rating_average" REAL /* Average rating for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., organizer, administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that has this permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., create events, manage users) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
